core.execution.optimizer_wrapper module

OPTIMIZER WRAPPER - Runs agentic code with real-time system optimization

This wrapper: 1. Launches the real agentic.py as a subprocess 2. Detects phases via environment variables or signals 3. Applies system optimizations based on YOUR A-LEMS data 4. Passes through all results unchanged

NO CHANGES to agentic.py required!

class core.execution.optimizer_wrapper.OptimizedExecutorWrapper(executor_or_config, workflow_type='agentic')[source]

Bases: object

Wraps ANY executor with real-time system optimization. Compatible with both LinearExecutor and AgenticExecutor.

execute(task)[source]

For linear workflow

execute_comparison(task)[source]

For agentic workflow - matches original interface

class core.execution.optimizer_wrapper.SystemOptimizer(pid)[source]

Bases: object

Real-time system optimizer based on phase detection

print_summary()[source]

Print optimizer summary

run(stop_event)[source]

Monitor process and detect phases until stop_event is set

set_phase(phase)[source]

Called when phase changes - applies optimizations
